'''Notoganarech''' was an [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] who predicted the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] victory over the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with an [[Elomic physical calculus]].
